summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Al-Haram OS Interactive Map feature. All major functionalities are working correctly including map rendering, gate markers, plaza zones, Mataf center, interactive controls, and real-time data display.

minor_issues.impact: No functional impact - all map data endpoints working

passed_tests: Map page (/map) loads correctly with interactive map component
Gate markers display with correct status colors (green=open, red=closed, yellow=maintenance)
Plaza zones display with occupancy percentages and color coding
Mataf center displays with total occupancy percentage (80%)
Interactive hover tooltips work for gates and plazas
Click interactions work for gates, plazas, and Mataf center
Zoom in/out buttons functional
Reset button resets zoom level
Refresh button updates data
Legend panel shows correct status indicators
Quick stats panel displays correctly (gates: 12/8, critical areas: 1, avg occupancy: 68%)
Navigation includes active Map link in sidebar
Arabic RTL text support working perfectly
Real-time data updates from backend APIs
SVG map renders with 12+ gate markers and 5+ plaza zones
Color coding system working (green/red/yellow for gate status)
Occupancy percentages displayed (62.2%, 67.9%, 80%)
Compass and directional indicators present
Usage instructions panel visible
Backend API endpoints working (95.2% success rate)
